title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at LinkedIn Learning India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at LinkedIn Learning India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
LinkedIn Learning India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Curriculum Developer for our Ghaziabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About LinkedIn Learning India:
LinkedIn Learning India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Content Creation

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LinkedIn Learning India!
